sourceTitle: Guidance on AI in assessment | UNSW Staff Teaching Gateway
evidenceSnippetOriginal: Where the unauthorised use of AI in an assessment is admitted or determined, a finding of serious student misconduct is made – as a breach of Principle 3 of the Student Code of Conduct which states that students must act with integrity, honesty and trust. The penalties for a finding of this sort would be consistent with the penalties for Serious Student Misconduct and Serious Plagiarism – they would normally sit at 00FL for the course, suspension or exclusion depending on the matter.
evidenceLocator: Section 'How can a student be penalised for improper use of GenAI?'
